kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.name: Passenger Can Submit Report Successfully

kw.name: Open Trip And Report
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การเดินทางของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Select All Trips Tab
Click Button

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ส่งรายงานสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: Passenger Cannot Submit Without Selecting User

kw.name: Open Trip And Report
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การเดินทางของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Select All Trips Tab
Click Button
kw.msg: Button with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ทั้งหมด')]' not found.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: Button with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ทั้งหมด')]' not found.
Button with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ทั้งหมด')]' not found.
Button with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ทั้งหมด')]' not found.

kw.name: Element Should Be Disabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Button with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ทั้งหมด')]' not found.

test.name: Passenger Cannot Submit With Short Description

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
